judgeScores.justification: The campaign excels at voice consistency, weaving 'it just works' and 'adapts to your life' messaging throughout all six deliverables to build a cohesive brand identity. The calendar-aware lighting feature offers a genuinely fresh functional angle compared to generic smart lamps, though the tagline and hero headline rely on safe, predictable phrasing rather than bold creative swings. While thoroughly executed with complete, professional content across all required files, the social media posts could benefit from stronger platform-specific differentiation beyond minor formatting variations.
